description: Your supervisor often asks you to do two or more things that conflict (for example, save a large amount of money while at the same time dramatically increasing quality).

name: Role Negotiability
description: The extent to which an individual can negotiate his/her role in an organization

name: Negotiate Changes in Role with Supervisor
description: You have negotiated changes in the nature of your role at work with your supervisor.

name: Significant Input Into Way You Do Job
description: You have significant input into the way you do your job.

name: Role Overload
description: A discrepancy between the job's demands and one's ability to meet those demands

name: Get Assignments without Adequate Resources
description: You receive assignments at work without adequate resources and materials to complete them properly.

name: Given Enough Time to Do Work
description: You are given enough time to do what is expected of you at work.

name: Too Much for One Person to Do
description: It often seems like you have too much work for one person to do.

name: Culture
description: Patterns of behaviors and social relationships reflecting the assumptions, values, norms, and artifacts shared by members of the organization

name: Organizational Values
description: Indicates the importance of different organizational values such as tradition, stability, innovation, and collaboration

name: Guiding Principles of Organization
description: How important are each of the following concepts, or values, as a guiding principle for your organization as a whole.

name: Taking Chances; Going Out on a Limb
description: Taking chances; going out on a limb

name: Fairness; Justice
description: Fairness; justice

name: Precision
description: Precision; paying attention to even the smallest details

name: Stability
description: Stability; keeping things on an even keel

name: Getting Things Done
description: Getting things done; taking decisive or quick action

name: Caring About Employees
description: Caring about employees; showing concern for their well-being

name: Innovation
description: Innovation; finding new and better ways of doing things; openness to new ideas

name: Aggressiveness
description: Aggressiveness; forcefully going after what you want

name: Valuing Customers
description: Valuing customers; emphasizing customer service

name: Providing High Quality Products
description: Providing high quality products or services; meeting high standards of excellence

name: Openness and Honesty
description: Openness; honesty; keeping employees well informed

name: Flexibility, Adapting to Change
description: Flexibility, adapting to change

name: Supervisor Role
description: The nature of supervisory leadership

name: Supervisor Friendly and Supportive
description: To what extent does your supervisor act in a friendly and supportive manner? For example, does he/she show concern for members of your work group and respect for your ideas?

name: Supervisor Takes Active Role
description: To what extent does your supervisor take an active role in directing your work group's activities by setting goals, planning and scheduling work, assigning tasks, and making sure that each person knows what he/she should be doing?

name: Supervisor Provides Clear Vision
description: To what extent does your supervisor provide members of your work group with a clear vision of where the group is going and keep everyone fully committed to the work at hand?

name: Supervisor Solves Problems
description: To what extent does your supervisor quickly and effectively solve problems, even difficult problems, that come up in your work group?

name: Work Context
description: Physical and social factors that influence the nature of work

name: Interpersonal Relationships
description: This category describes the context of the job in terms of human interaction processes

name: Communication
description: Types and frequency of interactions with other people that are required as part of this job.

name: Communication Methods
description: How frequently does this job require the use of the following communication methods?

name: Public Speaking
description: How frequently does your job require public speaking (one speaker with an audience)?

name: Telephone Conversations
description: How often do you have telephone conversations in this job?

name: E-Mail
description: How frequently does your job require you to use E-mail?

name: Written Letters and Memos
description: How frequently does your job require written letters and memos?

name: Face-to-Face Discussions with Individuals and Within Teams
description: How frequently does your job require face-to-face discussions with individuals and within teams?

name: Contact With Others
description: How much does this job require the worker to be in contact with others (face-to-face, by telephone, or otherwise) in order to perform it?

name: Role Relationships
description: Importance of different types of interactions with others both inside and outside the organization

name: Job Interactions
description: How important are interactions requiring the worker to:

name: Work With or Contribute to a Work Group or Team
description: How important is it to work with or contribute to a work group or team in this job?

name: Deal With External Customers or the Public in General
description: How important is it to deal with external customers (as in retail sales) or the public in general (as in police work) in this job?

name: Coordinate or Lead Others in Accomplishing Work Activities
description: How important is it to coordinate or lead others (not as a supervisor or team leader) in accomplishing work activities in this job?

name: Responsibility for Others
description: Amount of responsibility the worker has for other workers as a part of this job

name: Health and Safety of Other Workers
description: How much responsibility is there for the health and safety of others in this job?

name: Work Outcomes and Results of Other Workers
description: How responsible is the worker for work outcomes and results of other workers?

name: Conflictual Contact
description: Amount of conflict that the worker will encounter as part of this job

name: Conflict Situations
description: How frequently are there conflict situations the employee has to face in this job?

name: Dealing With Unpleasant, Angry, or Discourteous People
description: How frequently does the worker have to deal with unpleasant, angry, or discourteous individuals as part of the job requirements?

name: Dealing with Violent or Physically Aggressive People
description: How frequently does this job require the worker to deal with physical aggression of violent individuals?

name: Physical Work Conditions
description: This category describes the work context as it relates to the interactions between the worker and the physical job environment

name: Work Setting
description: Description of physical surroundings that the worker will face as part of this job

name: Frequency Required to Work:
description: How frequently does this job require the worker to work:

name: Indoors, Environmentally Controlled
description: How often does this job require working indoors in an environmentally controlled environment (like a warehouse with air conditioning)?

name: Indoors, Not Environmentally Controlled
description: How often does this job require working in an environment that is not environmentally controlled (like a warehouse without air conditioning)?

name: Outdoors, Exposed to All Weather Conditions
description: How often does this job require working outdoors, exposed to all weather conditions?

name: Outdoors, Under Cover
description: How often does this job require working outdoors, under cover (like in an open shed)?

name: In an Open Vehicle or Operating Equipment
description: How often does this job require working in an open vehicle or operating equipment (like a tractor)?

name: In an Enclosed Vehicle or Operate Enclosed Equipment
description: How often does this job require working in a closed vehicle or operate enclosed equipment (like a car)?

name: Physical Proximity
description: To what extent does this job require the worker to perform job tasks physically close to other people?

name: Environmental Conditions
description: Description of extreme environmental conditions the worker will be placed in as part of this job

name: Frequency in Environmental Conditions
description: How often during a usual work period is the worker exposed to the following conditions:

name: Exposed to Sounds, Noise Levels that are Distracting or Uncomfortable
description: How often does this job require working exposed to sounds and noise levels that are distracting or uncomfortable?

name: Exposed to Very Hot or Cold Temperatures
description: How often does this job require working in very hot (above 90 F degrees) or very cold (below 32 F degrees) temperatures?

name: Exposed to Extremely Bright or Inadequate Lighting Conditions
description: How often does this job require working in extremely bright or inadequate lighting conditions?

name: Exposed to Contaminants
description: How often does this job require working exposed to contaminants (such as pollutants, gases, dust or odors)?

name: Exposed to Cramped Work Space, Awkward Positions
description: How often does this job require working in cramped work spaces that requires getting into awkward positions?

name: Exposed to Whole Body Vibration
description: How often does this job require exposure to whole body vibration (like operating a jackhammer or earth moving equipment)?

name: Job Hazards
description: Descriptions of types of hazardous conditions the worker could be exposed to as part of this job. This includes the frequency of exposure, and the likelihood and degree of injury if exposed.

name: Frequency of Exposure to Job Hazards
description: How often does this job require the worker to be exposed to the following hazards?

name: Exposed to Radiation
description: How often does this job require exposure to radiation?

name: Exposed to Disease or Infections
description: How often does this job require exposure to disease/infections?

name: Exposed to High Places
description: How often does this job require exposure to high places?

name: Exposed to Hazardous Conditions
description: How often does this job require exposure to hazardous conditions?

name: Exposed to Hazardous Equipment
description: How often does this job require exposure to hazardous equipment?

name: Exposed to Minor Burns, Cuts, Bites, or Stings
description: How often does this job require exposure to minor burns, cuts, bites, or stings?

name: Likelihood of Injury From Job Hazards
description: What is the likelihood that the worker would be injured as a result of being exposed to the following hazards while performing this job?

name: Degree of Injury
description: If injury, due to exposure to the following hazards, were to occur while performing this job, how serious would be the likely outcome?

name: Body Positioning
description: Amount of time the worker will spend in a variety of physical positions on this job

name: Time Spent in Body Positions
description: How much time in a usual work period does the worker spend:

name: Spend Time Sitting
description: How much does this job require sitting?

name: Spend Time Standing
description: How much does this job require standing?

name: Spend Time Climbing Ladders, Scaffolds, or Poles
description: How much does this job require climbing ladders, scaffolds, poles, etc.?

name: Spend Time Walking or Running
description: How much does this job require walking or running?

name: Spend Time Kneeling, Crouching, Stooping, or Crawling
description: How much does this job require kneeling, crouching, stooping or crawling?

name: Spend Time Keeping or Regaining Balance
description: How much does this job require keeping or regaining your balance?

name: Spend Time Using Your Hands to Handle, Control, or Feel Objects, Tools, or Controls
description: How much does this job require using your hands to handle, control, or feel objects, tools or controls?

name: Spend Time Bending or Twisting Your Body
description: How much does this job require bending or twisting your body?

name: Spend Time Making Repetitive Motions
description: How much does this job require making repetitive motions?

name: Work Attire
description: Dress requirements of this job

name: Frequency of Wearing Work Attire
description: How often does the worker wear:

name: Wear Common Protective or Safety Equipment such as Safety Shoes, Glasses, Gloves, Hearing Protection, Hard Hats, or Life Jackets
description: How often does this job require wearing common protective or safety equipment such as safety shoes, glasses, gloves, hearing protection, hard hats or life-jackets?

name: Wear Specialized Protective or Safety Equipment such as Breathing Apparatus, Safety Harness, Full Protection Suits, or Radiation Protection
description: How often does this job require wearing specialized protective or safety equipment such as breathing apparatus, safety harness, full protection suits, or radiation protection?

name: Structural Job Characteristics
description: This category involves the relationships or interactions between the worker and the structural characteristics of the job

name: Criticality of Position
description: Amount of impact the worker has on final products and their outcomes

name: Consequence of Error
description: How serious would the result usually be if the worker made a mistake that was not easily correctable?

name: Impact of Decisions
description: The frequency and nature of the impact of worker's decisions on the organization

name: Impact of Decisions on Co-workers or Company Results
description: What results do your decisions usually have on other people or the image or reputation or financial resources of your employer?

name: Frequency of Decision Making
description: How often is the worker required to make decisions that affect other people, the financial resources, and/or the image and reputation of the organization?

name: Freedom to Make Decisions
description: How much decision making freedom, without supervision, does the job offer?

name: Routine versus Challenging Work
description: The relative amounts of routine versus challenging work the worker will perform as part of this job

name: Degree of Automation
description: How automated is the job?

name: Importance of Being Exact or Accurate
description: How important is being very exact or highly accurate in performing this job?

name: Importance of Repeating Same Tasks
description: How important are continuous, repetitive, physical activities (like key entry) or mental activities (like checking entries in a ledger) to performing this job?

name: Determine Tasks, Priorities and Goals
description: How much freedom does the worker have in determining the tasks, priorities, or goals of the job?

name: Competition
description: Amount of competition that the worker will face as part of this job

name: Level of Competition
description: To what extent does this job require the worker to compete or to be aware of competitive pressures?

name: Pace and Scheduling
description: Description of the role that time plays in the way the worker performs the tasks required by this job

name: Time Pressure
description: How often does this job require the worker to meet strict deadlines?

name: Pace Determined by Speed of Equipment
description: How important is it to this job that the pace is determined by the speed of equipment or machinery? (This does not refer to keeping busy at all times on this job.)

name: Work Schedules
description: How regular are the work schedules for this job?

name: Duration of Typical Work Week
description: Number of hours typically worked in one week.

name: Detailed Work Activities
description: Specific work activities that are performed across a small to moderate number of occupations within a job family.

name: Detailed Work Activities List
description: List of detailed work activities for each occupation

name: Intermediate Work Activities
description: Work activities that are common across many occupations. They are performed in many job families and industries.

name: Intermediate Work Activities List
description: List of intermediate work activities for each occupation

name: Occupation-Specific Information
description: Occupation-Specific Information

name: Tasks
description: Occupation-Specific Tasks

name: Task List
description: List of tasks for each occupation

name: Title
description: Primary title and code used to identify a single occupation in the O*NET-SOC taxonomy

name: Title
description: O*NET-SOC occupation title and code

name: Description
description: A statement of required or important duties performed by workers in an occupation in the O*NET-SOC taxonomy.

name: Description
description: O*NET-SOC occupation description

name: Alternate Titles
description: Alternate or "lay titles" include related job titles and occupational titles gathered from job incumbents, occupational experts, government agencies, professional groups, customer input, employer job postings, and other occupational classification systems.

name: Alternate Titles List
description: List of alternate titles

name: Sample of Reported Titles List
description: List of sample of reported titles

name: Technology Skills
description: Information technology and software skills essential to the functions of an occupational role.

name: Technology Skills List
description: List of technology skills for each occupation.

name: Tools
description: Machines, equipment, and tools essential to the performance of an occupational role.

name: Tools List
description: List of machines, equipment, and tools for each occupation.

name: Workforce Characteristics
description: Workforce Characteristics

name: Labor Market Information
description: Labor Market Information

name: Occupational Statistics
description: Information related to economic conditions and labor force characteristics of occupations

name: Occupational Outlook
description: Occupational Outlook

name: Occupational Projections
description: Projections of future economic conditions and labor force characteristics of occupations
